programmes.show_description: Documentary exploring the hidden workings of the tabloids, PRs and agents connected to the 'Wagatha Christie' incident, involving footballers' wives Coleen Rooney and Rebekah Vardy.

programmes.show_name: Louis Theroux's LA Stories: Among The Sex Offenders
programmes.show_description: In his final LA Story, Louis Theroux spends time in the twilight world of the city's paroled sex offenders, who live under force of tough regulations.
Crews from West Midlands Ambulance Service attend a diabetic who has collapsed at home, reassure the wife of a man with heart problems and keep up the spirits of a woman with womb cancer.
Shopping from Home.
One of the Boys: Domestic sitcom. Roger's mother visits London to meet future daughter-in-law, Abi. A drinking mate from Ben's youth has changed much more than he had expected.
Abi Ever After: Popular sitcom about an uptight dentist and his family. It's the day before Roger and Abi's wedding but, for this accident-prone couple, anything can happen.
Breaking up Ain't Hard to Do: Robert Lindsay stars in the popular sitcom. Old friends of Susan and Ben are having marriage trouble, and trouble shared can be a dangerous thing.
Life Begins at Fifty: More domestic mayhem in the hit sitcom about a dentist and his family. Susan is accused of shoplifting. When Ben defends her, things go from bad to worse.
The Parent Trap: More domestic turmoil with the Harpers. Ben takes delivery of his neighbour's TV, but Michael's current love interest may be expecting a smaller delivery.
Let's Not Be Heisty: Farcical sitcom. Ben's visit to his bank unhappily coincides with that of some armed robbers. With Ben as the negotiator, things look bleak for the hostages.
Game show in which contestants face a giant version of a classic arcade machine.
Game show in which contestants face a giant version of a classic arcade machine.
Game show in which contestants face a giant version of a classic arcade machine.
Albie, Flora & Parker: A puppy has a broken back from being knocked over by a car, and Noel must use old-fashioned detective work to diagnose a Scottish terrier's mysterious ailment.
Hermes & Dave: Noel faces one of his greatest ever practical and ethical challenges as he tries to provide Hermes, a one-legged tortoise, with three new prosthetic feet.
Simba, Tulee & Poppy: A small Cavachon has a broken leg and a serious heart condition, while a Labrador needs help with badly-formed hips and a nervous Basset Hound has a spinal problem.
Luca, Ivor & Bow: The team offer cutting-edge treatment for Luca, a long-suffering four-year-old Springer spaniel with a painful elbow. Plus, a leaky Labrador puppy needs surgery.
Tom, Otis & Bailey: A four-year-old French bulldog suffers a spinal injury being chased by another dog in the park, while a rescue Labrador has a wounded paw.

programmes.show_name: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programmes.show_description: The crews deal with a cycling accident and a woman having a heart attack, while paramedics go above and beyond to get a 24-year-old with severe allergies some medication.

programmes.show_name: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programmes.show_description: Paramedics in Portsmouth attend a man with a mechanical heart valve and a dangerously fast pulse, while in Oxford, crews treat a student having an asthma attack.
An eight-year-old is having an operation to straighten his squint, a man needs an ultrasound to confirm whether he has cancer and a new mum is having her wisdom teeth removed.
A 15-year-old has four baby teeth that have not fallen out and need removing, while a woman needs an operation to stop her persistent nose bleeds.
Make or Break: It's make or break for student midwives Ruby and Grace as they prepare for crucial exams. Mary is still finding her feet on the busy maternity ward.
With Great Power Comes Great Responsibility: In the final episode of the series, Tacha and Lilli must make decisions about their futures. The young midwives enjoy a spa day.
A woman assaults Officer Cortes in an unprovoked attack, two suspected lovers have been separated by jail staff, and Satanist Olga is having difficulty practising her religion behind bars.
There's heartbreak and jubilation as Alex meets two couples desperately trying to defy the odds and become parents.
In this emotional final episode, Alex comes to the end of her training at Kings and three couples await their results. Will they finally become parents?
Shopping from Home.

programmes.show_name: Gemma and Gorka: Life Behind the Lens
programmes.show_description: With Gemma's maternity leave coming to an end and Gorka about to head out on tour, it's time to pack in as much family fun as possible - before real life beckons.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine.

Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine.
Dartford: In one of the biggest builds on an individual house, the team are in Dartford helping a family whose house poses a daily battle for their severely disabled son.
Wigan: The team are building a self-contained apartment alongside a family home to allow parents to care for their son who was left paralysed after an unprovoked attack.
Hull: Home renovation series. The team and an army of local traders from Hull help to build a comfortable home for a father with Fabry's disease.

Property renovation series hosted by Drew and Jonathan Scott. The twins meet Carolyn and Gerald, who are hunting for a rural retirement home of their own.
More dream homes with the Scott twins. Drew and Jonathan help Johanna and Sean trade their rented townhouse for a perfectly customised forever home.
Dartford: In one of the biggest builds on an individual house, the team are in Dartford helping a family whose house poses a daily battle for their severely disabled son.
Wigan: The team are building a self-contained apartment alongside a family home to allow parents to care for their son who was left paralysed after an unprovoked attack.
Domino, Diamond, Willow & Luigi: Pop superstar Will Young brings in two of his rescue dogs, Domino and Diamond, while supermodel Yasmin Le Bon's French Bulldog Willow collapses at home.
Monty, Odin & Maya: Caucasian Shepherd Odin has Wobbler Syndrome, Toy Poodle Monty needs a total hip replacement, and Malamute Husky Cross Maya needs to get back on her four feet again.
Poppy, Keira & Bella: In this puppy special, Noel treats Border Terrier Kiera, and we look back at Springer Spaniel Poppy, who had one of the worst leg deformities Noel had ever seen.
